summary: Iteration 120 - AI Key Health Warning Banner Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: AI Key Health Warning Banner displays correctly in chat panel for workspace ws_e82d079bc8ef, showing warnings for claude and chatgpt placeholder keys. Banner includes AI Keys link and Platform Keys link (for super admin). No regression in chat panel load or channel switching.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Key Health Warning Banner feature verified: (1) GET /api/workspaces/{workspace_id}/ai-key-health endpoint returns correct structure with has_warning, warnings, providers, and channel_id fields, (2) Endpoint correctly detects placeholder/invalid platform keys for claude and chatgpt, (3) Frontend ChatAIKeyHealthBanner component renders correctly with amber styling, warning icon, and links to AI Keys and Platform Keys (for super admin), (4) Banner message shows affected providers: 'claude, chatgpt', (5) No regression in chat panel functionality - channel name, message input, and send button all visible and working.
